a1ClaimsToRefine.explanation: A1's quote concatenates navigation menu items (Residency Programs, Employee Resources, Volunteers, IM/Nurse/Pharmacy Residency) into one blob. The residency-program signal is present but the quote also contains unrelated nav items, lowering signal quality. Consider splitting into per-program references.

additionalUnresolveds: Page describes Research Development Program offering mentorship to clinicians for investigator-initiated research, but does not state whether medical students, residents, or external trainees can participate.
Page lists 'Contact the Research Team' as a navigation/section item but the cleaned text does not include any email, phone, or named coordinator.
Page references 'Global Physician Network' under Emergency Services without further description; unclear whether this is a referral network, recruitment channel, or visiting-physician pathway.
recommendedA3Focus: Confirm no PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE claim is emitted from this RESEARCH_PAGE — content describes patient-facing clinical trials and clinician-investigator mentorship only, with no medical-student/observer pathway.

Verify A1 c1 (Residency Programs nav reference) remains FUTURE_LANE_ONLY and is not promoted to PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE on the basis of the 'Pharmacy Residency Program' token (it is a PGY pharmacy residency, not a USCE pathway).

tier2.quote: Research Development Program provides mentorship and guidance for clinicians interested in pursuing investigator-initiated research projects, fostering innovation and advancing discovery.
tier2.claimText: Research Development Program offers mentorship for clinicians pursuing investigator-initiated research — clinician/trainee-facing program.
tier2.whyA1Missed: A1 captured navigation residency references but missed the body-text Research Development Program for clinicians, which is a Tier 2 trainee/early-career research mentorship signal.
tier2.tierAssignmentRationale: Mentorship program targets clinicians (residents/fellows/early-attendings) for investigator-initiated research — Tier 2 trainee-development territory, not Tier 1 USCE.
tier2.limitations: Page does not specify eligibility (residents vs attendings vs medical students); 'clinicians' is ambiguous.

tier3.quote: For PhysiciansMedical LibraryPhysician ResourcesPhysician RecruitmentResidency Programs
tier3.claimText: Navigation exposes a Physician Recruitment section under 'For Physicians' — Tier 3 attending/faculty recruitment signal.
tier3.whyA1Missed: A1 focused on Residency Programs token in nav and did not separately surface the adjacent 'Physician Recruitment' link, which is a Tier 3 career-pathway signal distinct from residency.
tier3.tierAssignmentRationale: 'Physician Recruitment' is attending/faculty hiring — Tier 3 post-trainee.
tier3.limitations: Navigation-only reference; no recruitment details, visa sponsorship, or job listings present on this page.

newClaims.quote: all individuals providing care to vulnerable populations are required to undergo background screening through The Florida Care Provider Background Screening Clearinghouse
newClaims.claimText: All care providers to vulnerable populations must complete background screening via the Florida Care Provider Background Screening Clearinghouse.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Background-screening requirement applies to anyone providing care at the system, including employed clinicians — a Tier 3 onboarding requirement.
newClaims.limitations: Statement is system-wide; does not call out trainees or visiting learners specifically.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1 focused on program list and recruiting callouts; missed the eligibility/credentialing sentence buried inside the system description paragraph.
